source_jobs.title: Events Lead
source_jobs.description:
Are you an events operator who treats every event as a commercial decision and a talent magnet? Do you want to build Solve's events function from the ground up, with full automation into our GTM pipeline and a clear ROI number against every dollar spent? Hackathons that pull in the best AI engineers, a flagship annual event the IP industry will talk about for years, and the gatherings that define our brand to customers and candidates alike.




🏗️ ABOUT THE ROLE

We are looking for a Founding Events Lead to build and run the channel that drives most of our pipeline, and the events that build our employer brand in AI engineering and IP.



You'll be joining the most lean, talent-dense, and fast-moving go-to-market team in London, working closely with Partnerships and Talent.



You'll be responsible for:

 1.  Owning Solve's global events strategy end-to-end, across GTM, talent, and brand.

 2.  Owning ROI on every event investment.

 3.  Building and running Solve's flagship annual event from concept to delivery, including format, audience, partnerships, content, and on-the-day execution.

 4.  Leading our presence at the events that matter most in IP and AI (AIPLA, INTA, IPO, EPO, ICLR, NeurIPS, ICML) across the US, UK, and Europe.

 5.  Designing and running hackathons that bring the best AI engineers and researchers into Solve's orbit, in partnership with Talent.

 6.  Building Solve's employer brand presence at recruiting events, university partnerships, technical meetups, and AI community gatherings.

 7.  Designing and delivering curated gatherings such as founder dinners, customer roundtables, candidate dinners, and community meetups across London, New York, and Munich.

 8.  Working directly with Chris, Sanj, Partnerships, Marketing and Talent on event strategy, audience targeting, and execution.

 9.  Owning vendors, budgets, logistics, and run-of-show with the operational rigour the role demands.

 10. Using AI to scale what was traditionally a high-touch function: automated event ops, attendee research, content repurposing, candidate sourcing from event participation, and follow-up sequences run end-to-end with AI in the loop.

 11. Building the automation pipeline that connects every event to our GTM function: attendee data flows into HubSpot and Ashby automatically; lead scoring, follow-up sequences, and SDR handoff run without manual lift; candidate flow from technical events lands in Ashby with full attribution.




👤 ABOUT YOU

As our Founding Events Lead, you have a track record of running and scaling events at a high-growth B2B or AI company. You bring the operational rigour to deliver flagship events at scale, the technical fluency to build the automation pipeline that connects events to revenue and hiring, and the commercial instinct to treat every event as both a pipeline lever and an employer brand asset.



Essential:

 1. Strong operational background in events at a high-growth tech or B2B SaaS company. You have run flagship events end-to-end and know what good looks like.

 2. Demonstrated ROI accountability. You can show how events you have run contributed to pipeline, ARR, or qualified hires, with numbers.

 3. Technical fluency with CRM and marketing automation tools (HubSpot, Salesforce, Marketo, or similar). You can build the workflows that connect event participation to GTM and talent pipelines, not just brief someone else to do it.

 4. Comfortable partnering across functions. You are equally at ease working with the Talent team on recruiting events and the Partnerships team on commercial pipeline events.

 5. High operational rigour. Vendors, budgets, logistics, run-of-show, and post-event attribution all handled without drop.

 6. Comfortable in a founder-led, high-agency culture with a small team and a high bar.

 7. Happy to travel internationally. This is a global remit.



Nice to have:

 1. Experience integrating events into a wider GTM tech stack (HubSpot to Ashby, Zapier or n8n workflow

source_jobs.title: Full Stack (Back-End Leaning)
source_jobs.description:
At Solve Intelligence, we aren’t just "using" AI - we are building the proprietary algorithms that define the future of Intellectual Property. We have real paying users, massive traction, and a mission to build a billion-dollar company.



🏗️ The Role: Full Stack Engineer. (Back-End Leaning)



We are looking for a super-talented engineer to help us build state-of-the-art AI products extremely fast. You will lead the development of algorithms that push the envelope of what is possible with LLMs.



What you’ll own:



 - Production-Ready AI: Develop and deploy proprietary algorithms that significantly increase the quality of generated patents.

 - SOTA Evaluation Pipelines: Build a robust, high-scale evaluation framework to benchmark our proprietary models and steer the direction of our R&D.

 - Advanced Prompt Engineering: Research and implement cutting-edge prompting methods to maximize model efficacy.

 - Full-Stack Impact: While focused on AI, you’ll work across the stack (Python, Postgres, React) to ensure our research translates into a seamless user experience.



💡 About Solve Intelligence



We are the fastest-growing startup transforming the IP landscape. Our AI platform manages everything from invention harvesting to patent generation.

 - Growth: 20-30% MoM revenue growth; selling to 600+ global IP teams (DLA Piper, tech giants, and boutiques).

 - Impact: Users report 50-90% efficiency improvements.

 - Backing: Recently featured in Sifted https://sifted.eu/articles/solve-intelligence-visionaries-20vc following our $40M Series B announcement, bringing our total funding to $55M from elite investors including Y Combinator, 20VC, Visionaries and others.



👋 Co-Founders & Team



You will work directly with a founding team of AI PhDs and elite engineers:

 - Sanj https://www.linkedin.com/in/sanj-ahilan-844b33137/ (CRO): PhD in AI (Gatsby Unit, UCL), ex-Huawei R&D, former lead at Magic Carpet AI (acquired).

 - Chris https://www.linkedin.com/in/chris-parsonson/ (CEO): PhD in AI (UCL), published researcher, ex-Dyson and Alan Turing Institute.

 - Angus https://www.linkedin.com/in/angus-parsonson/ (CTO): MEng Computer Science, ex-Qualcomm and Coremont (Brevan Howard).



🚀 Who You Are



We are a young company of highly motivated "hackers" building at a relentless pace.

 - Speed is your default: You want to put things in the hands of customers in days, not months.

 - You are a grinder: You have a strong work ethic and are willing to go the extra mile (long nights/weekends) to achieve excellence.

 - You are an optimist: You thrive in a high-energy, positive environment and take extreme ownership of your outcomes.



🛠️ What You Bring



Must-Haves:

 - Expert Python Skills: Deep experience building and shipping AI solutions.

 - Production Experience: A history of shipping algorithms and/or evaluation pipelines into live environments.

 - LLM Mastery: Practical experience with prompt engineering and modern LLM architectures.

 - Technical Versatility: Familiarity with the full stack (Postgres, TypeScript, React).

 - Clear Communication: Ability to articulate complex technical decisions clearly.



Nice-to-Haves:

 - Publications at top ML conferences (NeurIPS, ICLR, ICML).

 - Familiarity with frameworks like OpenAI Evals.

 - A history of interesting GitHub contributions or "impressively difficult" side projects.



🎁 What We Offer



 - Competitive Salary + Significant Equity: We want you to have true ownership in our success.

 - Growth: Opportunity to work with a world-class team on a genuine rocket ship trajectory.

 - Support: Full visa sponsorship and private medical insurance.

 - The Goods: Free meals and a high-performance office culture in London.



Ready to build the future of AI? Apply now. 🚀

source_jobs.title: Sales Development / GTM
source_jobs.description:
🏗️ THE ROLE: SALES DEVELOPMENT / GTM



Less than 24 months since launch, we are adding 7 figures of ARR per month. We’ve built a world-class team of AI PhDs, engineers, and patent attorneys. Now, we need a high-energy, ambitious GTM specialist to build our outbound engine and help us scale to $1B+ ARR.

What you’ll own:

 - Identify high-potential leads and strategic prospects within our target market.

 - Drive outbound activity through cold calling, emailing, and social media to hunt new business.

 - Deploy personalized, high-impact outreach campaigns to maximize lead conversion.

 - Sync closely with Account Executives to navigate prospect objections and leverage market trends.

 - Continuously refine outreach strategies based on real-time feedback and market response.

 - Track and report on critical metrics, including conversion rates, lead quality, and outreach velocity.

 - Partner with sales leadership to analyze data and optimize the playbook for scale.




💡 ABOUT SOLVE INTELLIGENCE

We are the fastest-growing startup transforming Intellectual Property. Our AI-powered platform handles invention harvesting, patent generation, and portfolio management.

 - 20-30% MoM revenue growth.

 - 300+ IP teams globally, including Tier-1 firms like DLA Piper and major tech enterprises.

 - Users report 50-90% efficiency gains.

Recently announced our $40M Series B (Total funding: $55M) from elite investors including Y Combinator, 20VC, and Visionaries.




You’ll be joining a founding team with deep pedigree:

 - Sanj https://www.linkedin.com/in/sanj-ahilan-844b33137/ (CRO): PhD in AI (Gatsby Unit, UCL), ex-Huawei R&D, former lead at Magic Carpet AI (acquired).

 - Chris https://www.linkedin.com/in/chris-parsonson/ (CEO): PhD in AI (UCL), published researcher, ex-Dyson and Alan Turing Institute.

 - Angus https://www.linkedin.com/in/angus-parsonson/ (CTO): MEng Computer Science, ex-Qualcomm and Coremont (Brevan Howard).




🚀 WHO YOU ARE

We are a high-performance culture. To thrive here:

 - You prioritize speed, are always itching to move faster, and want to book meetings in hours, not weeks.

 - You have a relentless work ethic and take extreme ownership of your KPIs. You’re willing to go the extra mile to achieve the mission.

 - You thrive in a positive, high-stakes environment and are eager to learn whatever it takes to win.

 - You understand we are at the start of an exponential curve and want to drive mass adoption of state-of-the-art tools.




🛠️ WHAT YOU BRING

Must-Haves:

 - Experience in B2B sales with a history of smashing KPIs and securing high-value meetings.

 - Exceptionally clear written and verbal skills to engage sophisticated legal and technical prospects.

 - A love for the data and a willingness to "grind" alongside the founders.

Preferred & Nice-to-Haves:

 - Experience selling complex SaaS products to mid-market or enterprise firms.

 - Frequent user of AI products with an understanding of the current LLM landscape.

 - Side projects, "hustles," or early-stage startup experience that shows you can build from zero.




🎁 WHAT’S IN IT FOR YOU?

 - Competitive base + unlimited commission upside.

 - Meaningful ownership in a rocket ship.

 - Full visa sponsorship and private medical insurance.

 - Free meals and the chance to work with the smartest minds in AI.

Ready to build the future of IP? Apply now. 🚀

source_jobs.title: Growth Engineer
source_jobs.description:
Are you a high-agency, ambitious person looking to work on groundbreaking projects? Do you want to be a major part of a rock-star team in a rapidly growing startup, collaborate with industry leaders, and make a real impact in the AI-for-legal landscape? Do you want to have ownership in a startup building something people want with significant traction? This is your chance to join a rocket ship!




🏗️ ABOUT THE ROLE

We are looking for a smart, high-agency individual with frontend-leaning software engineering experience to lead our product growth efforts. You’ll operate at the intersection of engineering, product, and marketing. You’ll work across the full range of metrics, including product usage analysis, product engagement, user acquisition, pipeline optimization, and more.

You’ll be responsible for:

 - Product usage analysis: Use dashboards (Posthog, Grafana, Datadog, etc.) to analyze usage behaviour and patterns, and then use that to (1) steer our top-of-funnel growth marketing and (2) drive engagement across our existing customer base.

 - Top-of-funnel optimization: Come up with novel ways to build top-of-funnel pipeline, and run creative experiments to build top-of-funnel (embed product features in SEO blog posts, track the performance of our paid ads, conferences, events, etc.).

 - Usage optimization: Develop workflows to flag unengaged users and experiment with strategies to drive more engagement.

 - Metric strategy: Work with us to define the key metrics we should be optimizing for.

 - Revenue & pipeline optimization: Help us optimize each step in our pipeline pre- and post-sale.




👋 WHO YOU’LL WORK WITH

Sanj https://www.linkedin.com/in/sanj-ahilan-844b33137/ (Chief Research Officer and co-founder): Sanj did his MSci in Physics at the University of Cambridge and his PhD in AI at the Gatsby Unit, UCL. He won awards at top AI conferences, worked on the R&D team at Huawei, and received widespread attention for his contributions to open-source LLM GitHub projects. He joined Magic Carpet AI as employee #4, where he developed AI strategies for trading which deployed millions of capital before being acquired by Blockchain.com http://Blockchain.com.

Chris https://www.linkedin.com/in/chris-parsonson/ (Chief Executive Officer and co-founder): Chris did his undergrad at Imperial College, masters at the University of Cambridge, and PhD at UCL, during which he published 10+ publications and won awards in top AI conferences and journals. He has worked in leading tech organisations, including Dyson, The Alan Turing Institute, and InstaDeep before its acquisition by BioNTech.

Angus https://www.linkedin.com/in/angus-parsonson-24935914b/ (Chief Technology Officer and co-founder): Angus did an MEng in Computer Science at the University of Bristol where he won a cyber security scholarship at GCHQ before working at Qualcomm. He then joined a London-based hedge fund, Coremont (Brevan Howard). There, he led a small team to build a greenfield trade processing platform which scaled to millions of trades per day.

You’ll also work with the rest of our super talented team of AI researchers, software engineers, patent attorneys, and go-to-market experts.




🛠️ WHAT YOU BRING

As our Founding Growth Engineer, you will be a driven, ambitious, and high-agency individual looking to have a big impact on the trajectory of a fast-growing AI startup’s product and growth. You might be a technical ex-founder or software engineer looking for high autonomy and the opportunity to have a significant impact.

Must haves:

 - Strong frontend-leaning engineering skills.

 - Strong product sense.

 - Interest in growth and the business side of things.

Preferred haves:

 - Experience with product analytics tools (e.g. Posthog, Datadog, Grafana, etc.).

 - Experience with launching or growing products.




🎁 WHAT WE OFFER

 - Competitive base salary depending on skill and experience.

 - Equity; we want you to take ownership in Solve Intelligence and

source_jobs.title: Account Executive/GTM
source_jobs.description:
At Solve Intelligence, we’re building something people actually want - and we have the revenue and traction to prove it.



🏗️ The Role: Full-Stack Account Executive



Less than 24 months since launch, we are adding 7 figures of ARR per month. We’ve built a world-class team of AI PhDs, engineers, and patent attorneys. Now, we need a high-energy, ambitious GTM powerhouse to help us scale to $1B+ ARR.



What you’ll own:

 - Build the GTM Motion: You aren't just following a playbook; you’re writing it. You'll architect our sales and growth strategy from the ground up.

 - Lead Generation & Networking: Smash outbound targets, leverage your network, and represent Solve at global IP conferences to book demos and win over key decision-makers.

 - Product Demos: Show the world the future of IP. You’ll teach leaders how to leverage AI to transform their workflows.

 - Closing Deals: Full-cycle ownership from lead to close, working with our Technical IP team to ensure seamless onboarding.

 - Product Influence: Act as the bridge between the market and our AI researchers. Your feedback will directly shape the product roadmap.



💡 About Solve Intelligence



We are the fastest-growing startup transforming Intellectual Property. Our AI-powered platform handles invention harvesting, patent generation, and portfolio management.

 - Growth: 20-30% MoM revenue growth.

 - Market: 600+ IP teams globally, including Tier-1 firms like DLA Piper and major tech enterprises.

 - Impact: Users report 50-90% efficiency gains.

We are a high-performance culture. To thrive here:

Preferred & Nice-to-Haves:

Ready to build the future of IP? Apply now. 🚀

source_jobs.title: Legal and Product Engineer
source_jobs.description:
At Solve Intelligence, we’re building the AI-powered infrastructure for the global Intellectual Property landscape. We need a rare hybrid - a Legal and Product Engineer who sits at the exact intersection of patent law and AI innovation to ensure our engine is technically superior and legally airtight.



🏗️ The Role: Legal and Product Engineer



This isn't your typical client-facing role or traditional R&D position. You are the bridge between the complex nuances of patent practice and the cutting-edge AI technology transforming it. You will translate the "language of law" into the "logic of code."

What you’ll own:

 - AI Output Engineering: Partner with our AI researchers to iterate on algorithms and prompt engineering, specializing our LLMs for patent-specific tasks like claim analysis, prior art comparison, and obviousness assessments.

 - Legal Benchmarking: Build proprietary datasets and evaluation frameworks to measure AI performance against real-world USPTO and international patent office requirements.

 - Product Roadmap: Serve as the internal voice of the practitioner. You’ll translate deep client insights from global firms into high-priority product features.

 - Strategic Partnership: Act as a technical thought partner for IP teams at firms like DLA Piper, leading pilots and ensuring our AI scales seamlessly across their prosecution and litigation workflows.

 - Playbook Development: Document and scale best practices for AI adoption across diverse sectors, from biotech to deep-tech software.



💡 About Solve Intelligence



We’re the fastest-growing startup transforming the IP industry.

 - Traction: 20-30% MoM revenue growth; selling to 600+ global IP teams (DLA Piper, tech boutiques, and global enterprises).

 - Proven Value: Users report 50-90% efficiency gains using our AI platform.

 - Backing: Recently featured in Sifted https://sifted.eu/articles/solve-intelligence-visionaries-20vc following our $40M Series B announcement, bringing our total funding to $55M from elite investors including Y Combinator, 20VC, Visionaries and others.



👋 Your Team



You’ll work directly with a founding team of AI PhDs and systems experts:

 - Sanj https://www.linkedin.com/in/sanj-ahilan-844b33137/ (CRO): PhD in AI (Gatsby Unit, UCL), ex-Huawei R&D, former lead at Magic Carpet AI (acquired).

 - Chris https://www.linkedin.com/in/chris-parsonson/ (CEO): PhD in AI (UCL), published researcher, ex-Dyson and Alan Turing Institute.

 - Angus https://www.linkedin.com/in/angus-parsonson/ (CTO): MEng Computer Science, ex-Qualcomm and Coremont (Brevan Howard).



🚀 Who You Are



We are a high-performance culture of "hackers" and builders.

 - Bilingual: You can speak "Patent" to an attorney and "Prompt" to an engineer without losing anything in translation.

 - Speed & Feedback: You want to put tools in users' hands in days, not months, and you thrive on rapid iteration.

 - Extreme Ownership: You take responsibility for the accuracy of our AI's legal reasoning and the success of our global client deployments.

 - Driven & Humble: You are a high-achiever willing to go the extra mile to tackle unsolved AI problems in the patent space.



🛠️ What You Bring



Must-Haves:

 - Qualified Professional: Admitted to practice before the USPTO, EPO or JPO.

 - 3+ Years Experience: Direct experience in patent prosecution, understanding the "pain points" of the industry first-hand.

 - Technical Foundation: Undergraduate degree in Engineering, Computer Science, or Life Sciences.



Preferred & Nice-to-Haves:

 - AI Tinkerer: Hands-on experience with prompt engineering and LLM tools.

 - Client-Facing Pro: Proven ability to manage relationships and lead strategic product demos.

 - Coder-Lite: Familiarity with Python or a background in software development.

 - Visionary: A deep belief that AI will fundamentally redefine the legal landscape.



🎁 What We Offer



 - Competitive Salary + Significant Equity: We want you to have true ownership in the

source_jobs.title: Full-Stack Engineer (Front-End Leaning)
source_jobs.description:
At Solve Intelligence, we’re building the AI-powered infrastructure for the global Intellectual Property landscape. We need a visionary Full-Stack Engineer (Front-End Leaning) to define how humans interact with the next generation of AI.



🏗️ The Role: Full-Stack Engineer



You’ll be joining the leanest, most talent-dense engineering team in London. Chat is a starting point, but it’s not the destination. You aren't just building dashboards; you are inventing the UI/UX paradigms for AI-assisted legal work - interfaces that didn't exist 18 months ago.



What you’ll own:

 - The Interface of AI: Lead the design and development of our user interface, moving beyond simple chat to create intuitive, high-performance tools for complex IP workflows.

 - Product Evolution: Rapidly prototype and ship features based on direct customer feedback from the world’s top law firms.

 - End-to-End Delivery: While front-end is your forte, you’ll dive into the back-end to ensure features are seamless, robust, and deployed at pace.

 - WYSIWYG Innovation: Own the integration and customization of advanced document editors (TinyMCE/CKEditor) to handle the heavy-duty drafting requirements of patent attorneys.

 - Engineering Culture: As a founding hire, you will help set the bar for code quality, speed, and design excellence across the entire stack.



💡 About Solve Intelligence



We’re the fastest-growing startup transforming the IP industry.

 - Traction: 20-30% MoM revenue growth; selling to 700+ global IP teams (DLA Piper, tech boutiques, and global enterprises).

 - Proven Value: Users report 50-90% efficiency gains using our AI platform.

 - Backing: Recently featured in Sifted https://sifted.eu/articles/solve-intelligence-visionaries-20vc following our $40M Series B announcement, bringing our total funding to $55M from elite investors including Y Combinator, 20VC, Visionaries and others.



👋 Your Team



You’ll work directly with a founding team of AI PhDs and systems experts:

🚀 Who You Are



We are a high-performance culture of "hackers" and builders.

 - Obsessed with Speed: You believe that shipping today is better than perfection next month. You iterate in days, not weeks.

 - Human-Centric: You understand that world-class AI is useless without a clean, intuitive interface that people actually enjoy using.

 - Extreme Ownership: You take pride in every pixel and every API call, ensuring a "five nines" level of reliability and polish.

 - Driven & Humble: You are willing to go the extra mile (including the occasional late night or weekend) to ensure our users are blown away.



🛠️ What You Bring



Must-Haves:

 - Experience: Professional experience building and scaling complex web applications.

 - TypeScript/React Expert: Deep mastery of modern front-end frameworks and state management.

 - Full-Stack Fluency: Comfortable navigating back-end systems and full-stack frameworks to get the job done.

 - Product Intuition: A track record of turning vague user needs into concrete, beautiful UI.



Preferred & Nice-to-Haves:

 - Design Skills: Proficiency in Figma and a "good eye" for modern aesthetics.

 - Database Knowledge: Comfort with Postgres and data modeling.



🎁 What We Offer



 - Competitive Salary + Significant Equity: We want you to have true ownership in the success of the company.

 - Founding Impact: You will have a direct hand in every product and arch

source_jobs.title: Infrastructure Engineer
source_jobs.description:
At Solve Intelligence, we’re building the AI-powered infrastructure for the global Intellectual Property landscape. We need a brilliant Infrastructure Engineer to build the secure, scalable engine that makes it all possible.



🏗️ The Role: Infrastructure Engineer



You’ll be joining the leanest, most talent-dense engineering team in London. You aren't just managing servers; you are designing the multi-region, high-throughput systems that handle complex AI workloads.



What you’ll own:

 - Cloud Architecture: Design and maintain our AWS environment using Terraform, optimizing for reliability, cost-efficiency, and massive scale.

 - Global Footprint: Build infrastructure patterns for multi-region deployment and fully isolated single-tenant environments for enterprise customers.

 - Developer Velocity: Architect CI/CD pipelines (GitHub Actions, Docker) that allow our team to ship safely and quickly.

 - Observability & Reliability: Instrument the stack with OpenTelemetry and Datadog to ensure we detect issues before our users do.

 - AI Performance Tuning: Tune autoscaling and network routing to handle resource-intensive LLM workloads with ultra-low latency.



💡 About Solve Intelligence



We’re the fastest-growing startup transforming the IP industry.

 - Traction: 20-30% MoM revenue growth; selling to 600+ global IP teams (DLA Piper, tech boutiques, and global enterprises).

 - Proven Value: Users report 50-90% efficiency gains using our AI platform.

 - Backing: Recently featured in Sifted https://sifted.eu/articles/solve-intelligence-visionaries-20vc following our $40M Series B announcement, bringing our total funding to $55M from elite investors including Y Combinator, 20VC, Visionaries and others.



👋 Your Team



You’ll partner with a founding team of AI PhDs and elite systems engineers:

 - Sanj https://www.linkedin.com/in/sanj-ahilan-844b33137/ (CRO): PhD in AI (Gatsby Unit, UCL), ex-Huawei R&D, former lead at Magic Carpet AI (acquired).

 - Chris https://www.linkedin.com/in/chris-parsonson/ (CEO): PhD in AI (UCL), published researcher, ex-Dyson and Alan Turing Institute.

 - Angus https://www.linkedin.com/in/angus-parsonson/ (CTO): MEng Computer Science, ex-Qualcomm and Coremont (Brevan Howard).



🚀 Who You Are



We are a high-performance culture of "hackers" and builders.

 - Speed & Safety: You believe that great infrastructure is what allows application engineers to move faster.

 - Extreme Ownership: You strive for excellence in every configuration and take pride in "five nines" reliability.

 - Driven & Humble: You are willing to go the extra mile (including the occasional late night or weekend) to ensure our systems are bulletproof.



🛠️ What You Bring



Must-Haves:

 - Experience: Owning and scaling cloud infrastructure (AWS preferred).

 - IaC Expert: Professional mastery of Terraform or similar.

 - CI/CD Veteran: Proven track record of building deployment pipelines that don't break.

 - Security First: Deep understanding of IAM, cloud networking, and security best practices.



Preferred & Nice-to-Haves:

 - Experience with ECS, container orchestration, and distributed task queues (Celery/SQS).

 - Strong Python skills.

 - Familiarity with the Datadog/Grafana observability stack.

 - A background in offensive security, CTFs, or AI/ML infrastructure.



🎁 What We Offer



 - Competitive Salary + Significant Equity: We want you to have true ownership in the success of the company.

 - Founding Impact: You will have a direct hand in every architectural decision we make.

 - Support: Full visa sponsorship and private medical insurance.

 - The Environment: Free meals and a seat at the table with an incredibly smart, ambitious team.



Ready to build the backbone of the future of AI? Apply now. 🚀

source_jobs.title: Motion Designer
source_jobs.description:
MOTION DESIGNER

Are you passionate about AI and eager to work on groundbreaking projects? Do you want to be a major part of a rock-star team in a rapidly growing startup, collaborate with industry leaders, and make a real impact in the legal landscape? Do you want ownership in a startup building something people want with real paying users and significant traction? Here's your chance!




🏗️ ABOUT THE ROLE

24 months since we launched, we’re already adding 7 figures of ARR per month.

We’ve built a rockstar team of engineers, AI researchers, and patent attorneys.

We’re now looking for a super-talented, high-energy, and ambitious Motion Graphics Designer to play a key role in our company’s growth and product launches. You will lead our social media motion graphics promotions.

You will lead our social media and conference motion graphics promotions, while working closely with our design, GTM, and product teams.

In this role, you will:

 - Develop a user-centric motion design system that scales to all products within our platform.

 - Work closely with our design, GTM, and product teams to bring scripts to life.

 - Partner with our design team to animate assets that can be embedded into the product experience.

 - QA work to ensure designs and creative assets are polished, on brand, and ready for release.

 - Help us execute efficiently to ship products that deliver value and impact for our customers.
   
   


👋 WHO YOU’LL WORK WITH

Sanj https://www.linkedin.com/in/sanj-ahilan-844b33137/ (Chief Research Officer and co-founder): Sanj did his MSci in Physics at the University of Cambridge and his PhD in AI at the Gatsby Unit, UCL. He won awards at top AI conferences, worked on the R&D team at Huawei, and received widespread attention for his contributions to open-source LLM GitHub projects. He joined Magic Carpet AI as employee #4, where he developed AI strategies for trading which deployed millions of capital before being acquired by Blockchain.com http://Blockchain.com.

Chris https://www.linkedin.com/in/chris-parsonson/ (Chief Executive Officer and co-founder): Chris did his undergrad at Imperial College, masters at the University of Cambridge, and PhD at UCL, during which he published 10+ publications and won awards in top AI conferences and journals. He has worked in leading tech organisations, including Dyson, The Alan Turing Institute, and InstaDeep before its acquisition by BioNTech.

Angus https://www.linkedin.com/in/angus-parsonson-24935914b/ (Chief Technology Officer and co-founder): Angus did an MEng in Computer Science at the University of Bristol where he won a cyber security scholarship at GCHQ before working at Qualcomm. He then joined a London-based hedge fund, Coremont (Brevan Howard). There, he led a small team to build a greenfield trade processing platform which scaled to millions of trades per day.

You’ll also work with the rest of our super talented team of AI researchers, software engineers, patent attorneys, and go-to-market experts.




🚀 WHO YOU ARE

We are a young company of highly motivated, ambitious, and hard-working individuals building a billion-dollar business. Our fundamental motivation is to build a state-of-the-art AI product to assist humans in generating intellectual property and to have mass market adoption of our software.

To thrive in this environment, you’ll have the following characteristics: You’re motivated to move fast - you prioritise speed, are always itching to move faster, and want to close deals on the order of days, not weeks or months. You’re passionate about mass adoption of AI - we’re at the beginning of an exponential curve, and we want to take the latest AI technology and build it into a useful product as quickly as possible. You’re a driven individual with a strong work ethic - our team is committed to going the extra mile, even if it means working long nights and weekends to achieve our goals. You strive for excellence in every aspect of your work - you take owner

source_jobs.title: AI Engineer
source_jobs.description:
Want to build AI agents that thousands of patent professionals rely on every day? We're a fast-growing, Series B startup putting state-of-the-art AI in the hands of legal teams across 6 continents, looking for engineers who want real ownership and real impact.

This is your chance to join a rocket ship! 🚀



🏗️ The Role: AI Engineer



We are looking for super-talented AI engineers to help us build state-of-the-art AI agents, extremely fast. You'll be joining the most lean, talent-dense, and fast-moving engineering team in London. You'll be responsible for:

 - Developing production-ready AI agents. We've built proprietary agents and tools for drafting, analysing, and evaluating patents. You'll improve these agents and ship new ones that directly move product quality and customer adoption.

 - Context management, tools and prompt engineering. You'll ensure our AI manages its context effectively at scale, reliably handling thousands of documents while producing the highest-quality output. You'll build the specialist tools and integrations that make this possible, and engineer prompts alongside our IP experts to maximise performance.

 - Building a state-of-the-art evaluation pipeline. Robust evals keep AI output high-quality and objectively steer our R&D. You'll build this pipeline and benchmark performance across large datasets.




👤 ABOUT YOU

As an AI engineer, you will have extensive experience building AI agents and products to solve impressively difficult problems through past projects, designs, or GitHub contributions.

✏️ Essential requirements

 - Expert in Python.

 - Industry experience of shipping agents and/or evaluation pipelines into production.

 - Experience with context engineering and prompt engineering

 - Familiarity with back-end development and Postgres databases.

 - Experience with front-end development (Typescript/React).

 - Extremely clear writer and communicator.

Nice to have:

 - Publications at top machine learning conferences (e.g. NeurIPS, ICLR, ICML) or in adjacent fields.




💰 WHAT WE OFFER

Competitive base salary depending on skill and experience.

Significant equity — we want you to take ownership in Solve Intelligence and share in the success that lies ahead.

Full visa sponsorship.

Opportunity to work with a super smart and ambitious group of people building something people want.

Private medical insurance.

Free meals.




🚀 ABOUT SOLVE INTELLIGENCE

Solve Intelligence is the fastest-growing startup transforming the IP landscape. Solve's AI platform manages everything from invention harvesting and patent generation through to litigation and licensing.

Growth: 20–30% MoM revenue growth; selling to 600+ global IP teams across 6 continents (DLA Piper, tech giants, boutiques, etc); 8 figures of ARR — all just ~2 years since we started.

Backing: $55M backing from YC, 20VC, Microsoft, Thomson Reuters, and the founders of top companies like Stripe, Perplexity, Tinder, Deel, Hugging Face, and Canva.

Impact: 50–90% efficiency and quality improvements.

See our latest Series B announcement https://www.solveintelligence.com/blog/post/solve-intelligence-raises-40m-series-b-to-build-ai-for-patents-and-launches-charts.

We're on a high-growth trajectory, and we're looking for people who want to join us on the journey to building a generational AI company.






👥 MEET THE FOUNDERS

Sanj (Chief Research Officer and co-founder): Sanj did his MSci in Physics at the University of Cambridge and his PhD in AI at the Gatsby Unit, UCL. He won awards at top AI conferences, worked on the R&D team at Huawei, and received widespread attention for his contributions to open-source LLM projects on GitHub. He joined Magic Carpet AI as employee #4, where he developed AI strategies for trading, before the company was acquired.

Chris (Chief Executive Officer and co-founder): Chris did his undergrad at Imperial College London, his masters at the University of Cambridge, and his PhD in machine learning at UCL, du

source_jobs.title: Patent Litigator
source_jobs.description:
PATENT LITIGATOR

🎯 Are you a patent litigator with a technical edge who wants more than just billable hours? Do you want to shape litigation product strategy for the fastest-growing AI company in IP? Do you want to own how we evolve the patent litigation product at a company that's rewriting the rules?

This is your chance to join a rocket ship! 🚀




🏗️ ABOUT THE ROLE

We are looking for a super smart and talented Patent Litigator to lead and build out our patent litigation capability as we launch Charts, our new patent litigation product.

You'll be joining the most lean, talent-dense, and fast-moving legal team in London.

You'll be responsible for:

 - Conducting infringement and validity analysis across technical domains

 - Advising on litigation risk and developing strategic recommendations for clients using the platform

 - Working directly with the engineering and AI teams to shape how Charts handles litigation workflows

 - Supporting patent prosecution-to-litigation handoffs across the IP lifecycle

 - Contributing to product development by translating litigation expertise into platform features

 - Managing relationships with outside counsel and coordinating multi-jurisdictional matters


👤 ABOUT YOU

As our founding Patent Litigator, you will have extensive experience handling complex patent disputes through associate or senior associate roles at top-tier litigation firms.

 - 3+ years of experience as an associate or senior associate in patent litigation

 - Technical background — ideally a patent attorney who moved into patent litigation (technical field agnostic: life sciences, electronics, mechanical, etc.)

 - Super smart, hard working, and high agency — the kind of person who thrives in fast-paced, ambiguous environments

 - Experience at elite patent litigation firms (e.g. Quinn Emanuel, Kirkland & Ellis, or equivalent calibre)

 - Strong analytical and strategic thinking with the ability to break down complex technical and legal issues

 - Based in NYC or London

Nice to have:

 - Experience across both life sciences and non-life sciences patent matters

 - Familiarity with AI/ML tools in legal workflows

 - Prior experience at a startup or in-house legal team

 - Dual-qualified or experience with cross-border patent disputes


💰 WHAT WE OFFER

Competitive base salary depending on skill and experience.

Significant equity — we want you to take ownership in Solve Intelligence and share in the success that lies ahead.

Full visa sponsorship.

Opportunity to work with a super smart and ambitious group of people building something people want.

Private medical insurance.

Free meals.


🚀 ABOUT SOLVE INTELLIGENCE

Solve Intelligence is the fastest-growing startup transforming the IP landscape. Solve's AI platform manages everything from invention harvesting and patent generation through to litigation and licensing.

Growth: 20–30% MoM revenue growth; selling to 600+ global IP teams across 6 continents (DLA Piper, tech giants, boutiques, etc); 8 figures of ARR — all just ~2 years since we started.

Backing: $55M backing from YC, 20VC, Microsoft, Thomson Reuters, and the founders of top companies like Stripe, Perplexity, Tinder, Deel, Hugging Face, and Canva.

Impact: 50–90% efficiency and quality improvements.

See our latest Series B announcement.

We're on a high-growth trajectory, and we're looking for people who want to join us on the journey to building a generational AI company.

Come join the rocket ship 🚀




👥 MEET THE FOUNDERS

Sanj (Chief Research Officer and co-founder): Sanj did his MSci in Physics at the University of Cambridge and his PhD in AI at the Gatsby Unit, UCL. He won awards at top AI conferences, worked on the R&D team at Huawei, and received widespread attention for his contributions to open-source LLM projects on GitHub. He joined Magic Carpet AI as employee #4, where he developed AI strategies for trading, before the company was acquired.

Chris (Chief Executive Officer and co-founder

source_jobs.title: Customer Support Specialist
source_jobs.description:
CUSTOMER SUPPORT SPECIALIST

Are you the kind of person who genuinely enjoys solving problems, and wants to do it inside a company that's moving fast? Do you want to shape a function as it's being built, learn how a real AI product works, and be in the room when decisions get made? This is your chance to join a rocket ship. 🚀


🏗️ ABOUT THE ROLE

We are looking for sharp, high-agency people to be the first line of support for our customers. You'll be joining the most lean, talent-dense, and fast-moving teams working alongside our attorneys, AI engineers, and GTM team to keep the bar on customer experience extraordinarily high.

Our customers are patent attorneys at top law firms and in-house IP teams at some of the largest companies in the world. They are demanding, technical, and short on time. Today, a lot of their support tickets land on the desks of attorneys and engineers who should be building product. That doesn't scale, and it doesn't give customers the speed they deserve. You will fix that.

You'll be responsible for:

 - Owning the first response on every inbound support ticket, across email, in-app chat, and Slack Connect channels.

 - Resolving the bulk of incoming tickets yourself: login issues, browser problems, account configuration, basic product questions, and walk-throughs of how to use Solve.

 - Triaging and routing complex tickets to the right attorney, AI engineer, or GTM owner with enough context that they can act immediately.

 - Building the playbook: writing the help docs, recording Loom walk-throughs, and turning recurring questions into self-serve answers so customers stop needing to ask.

 - Feeding customer insights back into the product. You'll be sitting on the patterns nobody else sees, and we want you in the room when we decide what to fix next.

 - Working closely with our customer-facing attorneys and CSMs to make sure customers feel looked after end to end.

 - Helping us figure out what good customer support looks like at Solve, then making it real.

This is a dedicated customer support role, the first of its kind at Solve. Some of the work is genuinely grunt work. The trade is that you get to shape how customer support runs at Solve, in a company where every hire is treated as a multiplier.




👤 ABOUT YOU

We're open about your background. We’ve identified two profiles that may work well for this role:

 - Paralegals or legal operations specialists with IP or patent exposure, comfortable in technical environments, and ready to build something with real ownership.

The common thread is having a builder mentality. You should be the kind of person who fixes the thing rather than logs it.

Essential:

 - Genuine interest in customer experience, and evidence you've cared about it before. This might be a startup you've worked at, a side project, or a role where you've owned support, customer success, or service delivery directly.

 - Strong written communication. Most of your work will be written, and our customers are precise about language.

 - High agency. You spot the gap, you close it. You don't wait for someone to tell you what to do.

 - The ability to hold a high bar under pressure. Some tickets will be from senior partners at top firms. They expect speed, accuracy, and tone calibration.

Nice to have:

 - Paralegal qualifications or experience inside a patent practice (USPTO, EPO, or UK). Or a computer science, engineering, or hard-science degree.

 - Experience with support tooling (Intercom, Zendesk, Linear, Pylon, or similar).

 - Familiarity with AI products, prompt design, or evaluation workflows.

 - Comfort with technical products. You don't need to code, but you need to be able to read a stack trace, understand what a browser console is telling you, and learn the inner workings of a complex SaaS product quickly.




💰 WHAT WE OFFER

Competitive base salary depending on skill and experience.

Significant equity — we want you to take ownership in Solve Intelligence and share in

source_jobs.title: Design Engineer
source_jobs.description:
DESIGN ENGINEER



Are you passionate about design, and do you have great product taste? Are you looking to work on groundbreaking AI UI/UX projects? Do you want to be a major part of a rock-star team in a rapidly growing startup, collaborate with industry leaders, and make a real impact in the legal landscape? Do you want to have ownership in a startup building something people want with real paying users and significant traction? This is your chance to join a rocket ship!




🏗️ ABOUT THE ROLE

The recent step-change in the performance of AI has unlocked products that you fundamentally could not build 18 months ago.

The UX needed to build many of these products is yet to be determined. Chat is a good catch-all, but it is not optimal. There are so many open-ended questions.

That is why now is the most exciting moment in the last 20 years to be building UX.

We’re growing ~25% month-on-month. We’re moving extremely fast, and it’s incredibly exciting.

We need a super talented designer with amazing taste for building clean, intuitive products.

You will work directly with our founders, engineers, AI researchers, and attorneys to build beautiful products and invent new interfaces for humans to interact with AI. You will lead the design of interfaces, components, and UX flows across every part of our product suite.

Additionally, you will lead much of our brand design and motion graphics for promoting our new products and features on social media and at conferences.

You’ll be a Founding Member of a team building something people want.




👋 WHO YOU’LL WORK WITH

Sanj https://www.linkedin.com/in/sanj-ahilan-844b33137/ (Chief Research Officer and co-founder): Sanj did his MSci in Physics at the University of Cambridge and his PhD in AI at the Gatsby Unit, UCL. He won awards at top AI conferences, worked on the R&D team at Huawei, and received widespread attention for his contributions to open-source LLM GitHub projects. He joined Magic Carpet AI as employee #4, where he developed AI strategies for trading which deployed millions of capital before being acquired by Blockchain.com http://Blockchain.com.

Chris https://www.linkedin.com/in/chris-parsonson/ (Chief Executive Officer and co-founder): Chris did his undergrad at Imperial College, masters at the University of Cambridge, and PhD at UCL, during which he published 10+ publications and won awards in top AI conferences and journals. He has worked in leading tech organisations, including Dyson, The Alan Turing Institute, and InstaDeep before its acquisition by BioNTech.

Angus https://www.linkedin.com/in/angus-parsonson-24935914b/ (Chief Technology Officer and co-founder): Angus did an MEng in Computer Science at the University of Bristol where he won a cyber security scholarship at GCHQ before working at Qualcomm. He then joined a London-based hedge fund, Coremont (Brevan Howard). There, he led a small team to build a greenfield trade processing platform which scaled to millions of trades per day.

You’ll also work with the rest of our super talented team of AI researchers, software engineers, patent attorneys, and go-to-market experts.




🛠️ WHAT YOU BRING

As our founding designer/design engineer you will have extensive experience designing UI/UX, branding, motion graphics promotional videos, and more.

Must haves:

 - Expert in Figma.

 - Experience with Motion Graphics. We want to launch videos on social media promoting new features and products. An example of a great video of the kind we’d like to routinely publish is the ElevenLabs Series C announcement video: https://www.linkedin.com/posts/elevenlabsio_weve-raised-a-180m-series-c-to-give-every-activity-7290776708985593857-5ENg?utm_source=share&utm_medium=member_desktop

 - Experience building clean, intuitive UI/UX for software products.

 - Ability to get familiar with a technical product and autonomously innovate new UI/UX in an ambiguous setting.

Nice to haves:

 - Experience with other design suites (e.g. Adobe) a

notes: High-growth AI startup with strong engineering focus, multiple AI and engineering roles, and rapid hiring pace.
